use_cases: Displaying overflowing text content within a bounded container with native scroll behavior
Creating scrollable areas for long-form content like articles, descriptions, or documentation
Implementing accessible scroll containers with keyboard focus support
Containing user-generated content that may exceed fixed height constraints
ai_summary: A lightweight scrollable viewport component from Base UI that renders overflowing content within fixed dimensions. Features native scroll behavior with overscroll containment, rounded corners, and accessibility-focused focus-visible states. Designed as an atomic building block for containing long-form text or content that exceeds container bounds.
